sections.paragraph:
σέλινον (σέλῑνον, ου, τό,)

parsley, Lat. apium, Hom., etc.:—with its leaves victors at the Isthmian and Nemean games were crowned, Pind.:—from its being planted in garden borders came the prov., οὐδ' ἐν σελίνῳ οὐδ' ἐν πηγάνῳ "tis scarcely begun yet, " Ar.


Etym. deriv. uncertain
